news.title: FLSmidth & Co AS (FLIDF) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Service and PCV Growth ...
news.summary: Despite a 7% organic revenue drop, FLSmidth & Co AS (FLIDF) reports robust growth in service and PCV lines, with improved EBITDA margins and strategic financial guidance for 2026.

news.title: A Look At FLSmidth (CPSE:FLS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
news.summary: Recent share price performance and business snapshot FLSmidth (CPSE:FLS) has drawn fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock down about 15% over the past month and about 24% over the past 3 months, despite a positive 1 year total return. news.title: How The FLSmidth (CPSE:FLS) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analyst Targets Diverge
news.summary: FLSmidth’s fair value estimate has been trimmed slightly, with the base case price target moving from DKK 537.70 to DKK 534.20. This sits near the more cautious end of recent Street targets clustered around DKK 545, DKK 610 and DKK 710, where analysts are split on how execution and earnings quality should translate into the share price.
